Container.Name: PocketBook2Craft
Container.Overview:
Sync reading highlights from PocketBook Cloud to Craft.do.
Pulls highlights and notes from your PocketBook e-reader's cloud library and writes one document per book to Craft, with the original cover image, book metadata (author, publisher, ISBN, language), optional #author/#publisher tags, and each highlight rendered as a colored quote block.
Configure both services from the web UI (port 8080). Runs in the background on a configurable schedule and only pushes new highlights on each sync — no duplicates.
To run a second instance (e.g. another household member with their own PocketBook + Craft accounts): in the Docker tab, click "Add Container", pick the PocketBook2Craft template from the dropdown, change Name + WebUI port + the /config volume path. Each instance is fully independent.

Config.Name: WebUI
Config.Description: Web UI port. Change if running multiple instances.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent state directory. Holds credentials.json (chmod 600) and the SQLite sync state. Use a unique path per instance.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for log timestamps and the dashboard's last-sync display.

Config.Name: Sync interval (minutes)
Config.Description: How often the scheduler triggers a sync. Set to 0 to disable scheduled syncs (manual only).

Config.Name: Log level
Config.Description: Log verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR.
